rendered_text: 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다. (This request has been blocked due to sensitive information.)
notes: Wave 0 rollback regression — legacy path engine restored normal block behavior on character.ai. Submitted PII prompt (RRN 901010-1234567) in existing chat with Alastor-Season 2. Within 60s timeout, the chat thread rendered a 'Security Filter' (c.ai) bubble with the canonical PII block message in Korean+English: '민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다. (This request has been blocked due to sensitive information.)'. The expected_text '차단' is present. After the Security Filter bubble, an Alastor-Season 2 typing indicator (dots) appeared — the LLM was prevented from emitting a real reply, consistent with engine intercept firing successfully. Cross-confirms #1125 PROBE rollback finding on baidu: Wave 0 rollback is safe across services (baidu, character). Per #1124 chatgpt FAIL_NOT_RENDERED, character.ai uses chat-bubble injection (replace-stream pattern) which the rollback path correctly handles, whereas chatgpt's separate envelope/encryption layer was not yet restored in rollback scope. Recommend extending Wave 0 rollback coverage check to chatgpt next.
